common.companyBadge: Structure and Microsoft security for SMBs in Norway

home.heroTitle: Structure, security, and control—built on the Microsoft platform
home.heroSubtitle: We help small and medium-sized businesses gain clarity and the right level of security with Entra ID, Intune, and Microsoft Defender. We work preventively and systematically—not like a traditional helpdesk queue—so the environment is easier to run and support needs decrease over time.
home.foundationBody: From day one we put the essentials in place with clear standards: a secure foundation built correctly first, not patched in a hurry later.
foundationPoints: Website and web presence where needed
Microsoft 365 with a secure baseline: Entra ID, MFA, and admin protection
PCs and mobile with Intune—policies, updates, and the right level of Defender

value.devicesDesc: Devices are set up consistently and managed centrally with Intune—with clear standards wherever people work.
value.securityDesc: Entra ID and Microsoft Defender used correctly from the start—to reduce risk without making daily work heavy.
value.usersDesc: Less manual work, fewer deviations, and faster onboarding and offboarding—lower operating cost over time when the structure is in place.
value.scaleDesc: Clear standards mean fewer exceptions and less risk—lower total cost and more predictable operations over time.
value.monitoringDesc: Alerts and light routines in Defender and the platform—issues are caught early and documented.
value.standardsDesc: Shared practices for access, devices, and collaboration—less clutter, simpler audits, and fewer day-to-day errors.

home.whyLead: Structure in Entra ID and Intune means less firefighting and a more predictable day-to-day—before cost and risk grow.
home.whyBody: Small and medium-sized businesses need more than extra “firefighters”: you need standards, documentation, and continuous improvement. That makes IT easier to understand, safer to use, and cheaper to run over time.

whyPoints.riskDesc: Fewer escalations and deviations when roles, access, and devices are standardized and documented.
whyPoints.timeDesc: Better handling of lost devices or suspicious sign-ins—with Entra ID and Defender in place.
whyPoints.controlDesc: Predictable operations and less manual work when the foundation is right—not constant rush per incident.

home.ctaTitle: Ready for better structure and security?
home.ctaBody: We’ll have an informal conversation and suggest concrete next steps based on your environment. We usually respond within 1–2 business days.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Our services build structure and the right security level in your Microsoft environment. We use Entra ID, Intune, and Microsoft Defender to reduce risk and make IT more predictable. We work with standards, documentation, and continuous improvement—so support needs decrease over time.
services.ctaBody: We’ll do a short review of your environment and propose a prioritized plan—no obligation and no lock-in.

items.iamDesc: Identity is the foundation. We configure Entra ID so the right people get the right access—and unusual sign-ins and misuse are stopped early.
iamBullets: Separation of user and admin access
SSO and a documented access model
items.mdmDesc: We use Intune to standardize and secure PCs and mobile—from first setup to retirement. We build on the hardware and licenses you already have and raise the bar gradually to what fits you.
mdmBullets: Standard setup and policies in Intune
items.msDesc: Microsoft Defender is strong protection when configured correctly. We tune the level to risk and daily work—not maximum settings that create friction.
msBullets: Better protection against phishing and malicious attachments
Detects unusual activity on devices (Defender for Endpoint)
Clear follow-up when something must be handled
Aligned with Entra ID and Intune in one stack
items.collabDesc: People collaborate safely in Teams and SharePoint with clear rules for sharing and guests. When something looks suspicious, we help assess and act—and tighten the setup afterward.
collabBullets: Safe use of Teams and sharing channels
Governance of external sharing and guests
Data classification and DLP where it adds value
Routines that reduce leakage and mis-sharing
items.groundworkDesc: Priorities, documentation, and practical steps—not a traditional “hour bank” model. We help you choose the right order and document so operations and audits get easier.
groundworkBullets: Review of current setup and risk
Website and business account setup where needed
Microsoft 365 with security in mind from the start
Documentation and routines you actually use
items.securityMonitoringDesc: Follow-up on alerts from Defender and the platform—with clear prioritization. For suspicious activity you get help to assess next steps, and we adjust the setup so similar issues repeat less often.
securityMonitoringBullets: Monitoring of devices, identity, and email
Policy, compliance, and improvement over time

about.badge: Structure and Microsoft security for SMBs in Norway
about.title: About SecCloudPath
about.intro: SecCloudPath helps small and medium-sized businesses build a secure, structured IT environment on the Microsoft platform. We are not a classic helpdesk factory—we work preventively with standards and control in Entra ID, Intune, and Microsoft Defender, so you get fewer problems and lower risk over time.
about.cardBody1: We work with SMBs that want structure first: clear standards, documentation, and less reliance on ongoing firefighting.
about.cardBody2: The result is an environment that is easier for leadership and staff to understand, safer to use, and more predictable to operate.
about.approachIntro: We review your current setup and risk. We establish standards for identity, devices, and access in your Microsoft environment. We document at a level you can use. We follow up and improve continuously—so the structure lasts.

pillars.practicalDesc: Clear steps and deliverables you can verify—without unnecessary complexity.
pillars.securityDesc: We use Microsoft Defender and identity controls in Entra ID to stop common threats before they become incidents.
pillars.structureDesc: Clear standards in Entra ID and Intune mean fewer deviations, simpler operations, and lower total cost over time.
pillars.scaleDesc: The same principles work as you grow: standardized onboarding, clear roles, and control over new devices.

about.partnerTitle: A reliable partner for digital security
about.partnerBody1: You get guidance grounded in the Microsoft management stack—Entra ID, Intune, and Defender—and documentation you can rely on.
about.partnerBody2: Have an informal conversation about your environment and concrete next steps. We usually respond within 1–2 business days.

contact.badge: Let’s talk about security and your IT needs
contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: If you want stronger digital security and better structure on the Microsoft platform, we would be happy to help. Send a message and we will get back to you for an informal conversation.
